== Notes for [[Item:Q111912|Q111912]] ==

Cavaleiro da Corte de D. Afonso V, Rei de Leão

---------

but not known son of https://www.geni.com/people/Munio-Guterres-de-Celanova-III-Conde-del-Sobrado/6000000021801820504
(& a his DIY unsourced wife https://www.geni.com/people/Velasquita-de-Celanova-DIY/6000000003087068393 )

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
